title: Data Transformation Path
description: Build fluency in Data Transformation inside Data Preprocessing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Masking
steps.summary: Masking belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Transformation. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Transformation. Compare it with Window Masking and URL Masking. It opens into URL Masking and Span Masking.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Binning
steps.summary: Binning belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Transformation. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Transformation. Compare it with Data Binning and Loss-Guided Binning. It opens into Data Binning and Equal-Width Binning.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Discretization
steps.summary: Discretization belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Transformation. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Transformation. Compare it with Feature Discretization and Data Discretization. It opens into Data Discretization and Feature Discretization.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Loss-Guided Binning
steps.summary: Loss-Guided Binning belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Transformation. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Transformation. Start after Binning and Loss.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Fine-Tuning via Soft Masking
steps.summary: Fine-Tuning via Soft Masking belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Transformation. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Transformation. Start after Masking and Fine Tuning.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Data Binning
steps.summary: Data Binning belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Transformation. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Transformation. Start after Binning. It opens into Privacy-Preserving Data Binning.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Data Discretization
steps.summary: Data Discretization belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Transformation. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Transformation. Start after Discretization. It opens into Privacy-Preserving Data Discretization.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Data masking adapters
steps.summary: Data masking adapters belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Transformation. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Transformation. Start after Masking and Adapters.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
